headline: Evercore ISI Raises its Price Target on Cummins (CMI)
summary: Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) is one of the 10 Best Performing Data Center Stocks So Far in 2026. On May 11, 2026, Evercore ISI raised the firm’s price target on Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) to $845 from $694 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. Truist also raised the firm’s price target on Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) […]
